Berkshire Hathaway.notes: AAPL +3.82%, AXP -0.75%, KO -2.80%. Mixed performance, grading window closed 2026-07-20.

macro_rules.risk_off_definition: VIX > 25 OR SPY < 200-DMA trend brake OR major war/escalation OR circuit-breaker
macro_rules.risk_off_action: Halve new buy sizes; skip affected sectors. CORE_SPY 50%→25%; MTUM 25%→15% vol-scale.

lessons.learning: Day 18: RISK_OFF regime activated. SPY closed below 200-DMA for first time. CORE_SPY trend brake executed: sold 31.8788 shares, proceeds $23,404 to cash. New buy sizing halved. Momentum MTUM entry error (peak at RSI >70) now -4.50%. Berkshire mixed. ELV early +1.33%. Drawdown -3.18% (within pain limit). Charter compliant. Dry powder $43.4k ready for Monday resolution.
